products.name: Money Attraction Spray
products.shortDescription: Energized spray for attracting wealth and prosperity
products.fullDescription: Our Money Attraction Spray is infused with powerful crystals and essential oils, carefully blessed and energized to attract financial abundance into your life. Use it daily to remove money blocks and invite prosperity.
products.ingredients: Rose water, essential oils, charged crystals, sacred herbs
products.usage: Spray in your wallet, cash register, or around your workspace

products.name: Business Booster Spray
products.shortDescription: Boost your business energy and attract success
products.fullDescription: The Business Booster Spray is crafted with sacred herbs and crystal energies to enhance your professional growth. Ideal for entrepreneurs and business owners seeking expansion.
products.ingredients: Essential oils, crystal-charged water, sacred botanicals
products.usage: Spray at your workplace entrance and around your desk

products.name: Negativity Removal Spray
products.shortDescription: Powerful cleanser to remove negative energies from your space
products.fullDescription: Our most powerful cleansing spray, designed to purify spaces from negative energies, evil eye, and spiritual blockages. Perfect for home and office use.
products.ingredients: Holy water, protective crystals, purifying essential oils, sacred ash
products.usage: Spray in all corners of your home, especially at entrances

products.name: Money Attraction Tilak
products.shortDescription: Sacred tilak infused with prosperity-attracting energies
products.fullDescription: This energized tilak is made with saffron, kumkum, and charged with powerful mantras to attract wealth and financial stability.
products.ingredients: Saffron, kumkum, sandalwood, charged crystal powder
products.usage: Apply on forehead before important financial decisions or daily worship

products.name: Road Opener Spray
products.shortDescription: Open new pathways and remove obstacles from your life
products.fullDescription: The Road Opener Spray is designed to clear blockages and open new pathways in life. Whether in career, relationships, or personal growth, this spray helps remove obstacles.
products.ingredients: Essential oils, crystal-infused water, road-opening herbs
products.usage: Spray before leaving home or before important meetings

products.name: Students Tilak
products.shortDescription: Enhance focus, memory, and academic performance
products.fullDescription: Specially formulated for students, this tilak enhances concentration, memory retention, and academic performance through the power of sacred ingredients.
products.ingredients: Brahmi extract, sandalwood, charged crystals, sacred herbs
products.usage: Apply on forehead before studying or exams

products.name: Health Tilak
products.fullDescription: The Health Tilak is infused with healing herbs and energized crystals to promote physical well-being and spiritual healing.
products.ingredients: Neem, turmeric, sandalwood, healing crystal powder
products.usage: Apply on forehead daily or during healing rituals

products.name: Money Recovery Spray
products.shortDescription: Recover lost money and pending payments
products.fullDescription: This unique spray is designed to help recover lost money, pending payments, and debts. Charged with powerful energies focused on financial recovery.
products.ingredients: Crystal-charged water, recovery herbs, essential oils
products.usage: Spray on documents, invoices, or areas related to pending finances

products.name: Camphor Essential Oil
products.shortDescription: Pure camphor oil for spiritual cleansing and meditation
products.fullDescription: 100% pure camphor essential oil, perfect for spiritual rituals, meditation, and energy cleansing. Traditional Ayurvedic preparation for holistic wellness.
products.usage: Add to diffuser or mix with carrier oil for topical use

products.name: Energised Mallika Dhooni
products.shortDescription: Traditional aromatic incense for spiritual cleansing
products.fullDescription: Handcrafted and energized Mallika Dhooni, made from natural ingredients for powerful spiritual cleansing and creating a sacred atmosphere in your home.
products.ingredients: Natural resins, sacred herbs, aromatic botanicals
products.usage: Burn on charcoal during prayer or meditation
